judgeScores.justification: Excellent organizational scheme with consistent snake_case naming throughout and intuitive categorization by file type and purpose. The balanced 2-3 level hierarchy (with screenshots at 4 levels being a minor deviation) and clear separation of concerns (e.g., photos by year, code by language) demonstrates thoughtful information architecture. MANIFEST.md comprehensively documents the rationale with a complete tree view. Every file is accounted for with no stragglers in the root directory.
